## Summary

Describe the battery thermal modeling note, checklist, or reference update.

## Technical Signal

- [ ] Clarifies assumptions.
- [ ] Improves reproducibility.
- [ ] Adds validation context.
- [ ] Improves citation or reading-log quality.

## Validation

- [ ] Units are explicit.
- [ ] Claims are evidence-backed.
- [ ] No copyrighted paper text is copied.
